contentBlocks.original:
माता रामो मत्पिता रामचन्द्रः ।
स्वामी रामो मत्सखा रामचन्द्रः ॥
सर्वस्वं मे रामचन्द्रो दयालु ।
नान्यं जाने नैव जाने न जाने ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mātā rāmo matpitā rāmacandraḥ .
svāmī rāmo matsakhā rāmacandraḥ ..
sarvasvaṃ me rāmacandro dayālu .
nānyaṃ jāne naiva jāne na jāne ..
contentBlocks.translation:
Rama is my mother and Rama (Ramachandra) is my father,
Rama is my lord and Rama (Ramachandra) is my friend,
Rama is my all in all, O the compassionate Rama (Ramachandra) is my all in all,
I do not know any other; i do not know any other; indeed i do not know any other.
contentBlocks.meanings: माता (mātā) – mother; रामः (rāmaḥ) – Rama; मत्पिता (matpitā) – my father (mat:my | pitā:father); रामचन्द्रः (rāmacandraḥ) – Ramachandra; स्वामी (svāmī) – lord; रामः (rāmaḥ) – Rama; मत्सखा (matsakhā) – my friend (mat:my | sakhā:friend); रामचन्द्रः (rāmacandraḥ) – Ramachandra; सर्वस्वं (sarvasvam) – all in all; मे (me) – my; रामचन्द्रः (rāmacandraḥ) – Ramachandra; दयालुः (dayāluḥ) – compassionate; न (na) – not; अन्यं (anyaṃ) – other; जाने (jāne) – know; नैव (naiva) – indeed not; जाने (jāne) – know; न (na) – not; जाने (jāne) – know;
